header.description: Creating innovative, user-friendly web experiences through clean design and efficient code

meta.descriptionDefault: Welcome to Skjærstein, where innovative design meets scalable functionality.
meta.descriptionAlt: Explore Jon Helge's portfolio for innovative web development and design solutions.

2.body1: Scalable, efficient web solutions using React, Node.js, and modern design tools. From dynamic applications to clean interfaces, your vision drives the build.
2.body2: Docker containerization, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and Railway hosting keep deployments smooth and your application stable.
2.body3: Clean code and thoughtful design decisions that solve real problems and work for your users.

4.body1: Every project starts with the user in mind. I prioritize intuitive interfaces that make your users' journey seamless and enjoyable.
4.body2: I develop robust and scalable systems that ensure your applications run smoothly, no matter the load.
4.body3: I prioritize building solutions that are robust, secure and maintainable, ensuring your applications are dependable now and in the future.

6.body1: I create solutions with <0>future growth</0> in mind, ensuring that even the smallest projects have room to expand when needed.
6.body2: I use tools like Docker and GitHub Actions to <0>streamline development</0>, making sure the process is smooth and efficient.
6.body3: <0>Simplicity</0> makes solutions easier to maintain and improve. I aim to keep my designs and code clean, so they're easy to work with.

8.body1: Have a project in mind? Send a message and let's discuss how to bring it to life.
